style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram of a small application moving left to right along a line, with four small round review markers spaced along the path, one tinted green, one amber-yellow, one rust-red, and one navy-blue, each inspecting the work as it passes and adding a small check mark. The four are evenly spaced and balanced. Warm cream paper with clear green, amber-yellow, rust-red, and navy-blue accents, hand-drawn and calm. No people, no logos.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram of a small application moving left to right along a line, with four small round review markers spaced along the path, one tinted green, one amber-yellow, one rust-red, and one navy-blue, each inspecting the work as it passes and adding a small check mark. The four are evenly spaced and balanced. Warm cream paper with clear green, amber-yellow, rust-red, and navy-blue accents, hand-drawn and calm. No people, no logos.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
